title: Infernal Craft
description: New blocks, plants, crafts, trees, mobs and most importantly the Infernalgrove biome
body:
Infernal Craft Update Alpha 3.0.0!

New Biome, New Structures, New Dimension.
The new update is very quiet but why not? You should visit the Silent Mansion and you will find out the secrets of the New Dimension or not.
Explore the world with the mod Infernal craft!

If you found a bug or have a suggestion email us at : infernalcraft678@gmail.com
